triage_rows.detail: Reduce mainline research can now be considered frozen; any future effort should either stay local-residue only or wait for the later handoff to intraday add.

interpretation: V1.34CM turns the reduce completion audit into a final direction judgment for the mainline research branch.
The correct reading is not that execution is solved. The correct reading is that broad reduce research is now finished enough to freeze, leaving only local residue maintenance under supervision.
